summary: Frontend Review Agent (Step #7) has completed independent review of FR-PERS-001 (Issue #13) implementation. PR #48 was merged into main. All 3 implementation files verified on main branch: ActionBar.tsx (Save button data-testid=btn-save, async save, QuotaExceededError handling, 5s error display), Notification.tsx (auto-dismiss 3s, error detection via includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite), persistenceService.ts (saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage, schema v1.0.0, PersistedModel interface). All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are present and correctly structured. Bonus: FR-PERS-002 and FR-SHARE-001 also implemented. Verdict: APPROVED — no blocking issues. Ready for human review gate.

artifacts.name: ActionBar.tsx
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, data-testid=btn-save, aria-labels

artifacts.name: Notification.tsx
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing notification overlay, error detection via includes('error'), role=status aria-live=polite

artifacts.name: persistenceService.ts
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0 and PersistedModel interface

artifacts.name: persistenceService.test.ts
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-01: serialization of all brick fields + schema version

artifacts.name: SaveModel.behavioral.test.tsx
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-03: clicking Save shows success notification

artifacts.name: PR #48 (merged)
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Implement FR-PERS-001 Save Model — merged into main

human_review_required.item: Performance test T-FE-PERS-001-02 uses mocked localforage — timing validates serialization overhead only, not real IndexedDB latency. Consider adding a comment clarifying this is mock-based.
loadModel does not validate schema version on load. Consider adding a TODO comment for future migration support.
Auto-dismiss setTimeout lives in ActionBar.notify() rather than Notification component itself. Architecturally sound but diverges from spec's implied ownership.

recommended_actions: Human reviewer: verify PR #48 is merged into main (confirmed: merged 2026-04-15T02:37:49Z)
Human reviewer: optionally run test suite to confirm all 4 test cases pass in CI
Human reviewer: review 3 minor non-blocking observations in HR-001, HR-002, HR-003
Human reviewer: approve and close Issue #13 if satisfied with implementation
Next: backend-coding-agent or next FR in pipeline per workflow plan
